title: rubus × trachyadenoides
intro: Rubus × trachyadenoides, also known as the Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry native to the Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × trachyadenoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Rubus × trachyadenoides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
